rationale: Increasing the homestead exemption reduces local property tax revenue, potentially affecting maintenance of local financial support under federal law referenced in subsection (a). The commissioner may need to adjust special education funding weights or amounts to compensate.
quote: the commissioner may adjust weights or amounts provided under Section 48.102 or 48.1021 as necessary to ensure compliance with requirements regarding maintenance of state financial support under 20 U.S.C. Section 1412(a)(18) and maintenance of local financial support under applicable federal law.
_note: Indirect fiscal linkage: homestead exemption increase reduces local school district property tax revenue, which could affect local financial support maintenance referenced in §48.1022(a). No direct statutory conflict; commissioner has discretionary adjustment authority.
